channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: How Pakistan positioned itself at the center of global crisis management
item.description: Pakistan has emerged as a global crisis mediator amid the US war on Iran.

item.title: What’s behind Donald Trump’s interest in Iran’s Kharg Island?
item.description: The US president is threatening to take over Iran's oil export hub or destroy it.

item.title: Analysis: Hezbollah backs Iran ambassador as conflict deepens Lebanon rifts
item.description: Lebanon’s expulsion of Iranian ambassador tests limits of state power as Hezbollah fights push for disarmament.

item.title: Iran’s FM confirms contact with US envoy Witkoff, denies talks under way
item.description: Iran's top diplomat Araghchi has told Al Jazeera that, despite contacts, Iran is not in negotiations with the US.

item.title: Israeli strike hits building in Beirut’s southern suburbs
item.description: A building in Beirut’s southern suburbs has been hit by an Israeli strike.

item.title: US-Israel launch major attacks as Iranian authorities maintain defiance
item.description: Bunker-buster bombs trigger massive secondary explosions at a mountainous area near Isfahan overnight.

item.title: One month of war on Iran cost Arab countries up to $194bn: UNDP
item.description: Even if conflict is 'short but intense', countries like Sudan, Yemen, Lebanon will see major increases in poverty rates.

item.title: Why Iran believes it can outlast the US
item.description: Iran is preparing for deeper US escalation while insisting it’s winning. Can this war end before it widens?

item.title: Qatar says ‘ready to help’ with US-Iran negotiations
item.description: Qatari Foreign Ministry spokesperson Majed al-Ansari says Qatar is “ready to help” with US-Iran negotiations.

item.title: Trump attacks NATO allies as pressure mounts over Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Al Jazeera’s Alan Fisher explains what Trump’s latest criticism of US allies means.
